name: Mustard and Bourbon Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, stir together the brown sugar, Dijon mustard, 1/4 cup of bourbon, soy sauce, Worcestershire sauce, and chopped green onions.
2. Use the marinade to marinate shrimp or scallops, covered, at room temperature for 1 hour.
3. Alternatively, use the marinade to marinate beef, chicken, or pork, covered and chilled overnight.
4. Baste shellfish or meat with the marinade as it is grilled.
